prompt: Create a hyper-realistic surreal luxury fashion magazine cover in a vertical 4:5 format. The image is an extreme macro close-up of a woman's open mouth filling the entire frame, with glossy deep burgundy-red lips, wet specular highlights, visible lipstick texture, and warm brown skin cropped tightly around the lips. The mouth is wide open into a dark black interior like a stage or portal. Across the upper teeth is an extravagant diamond-encrusted grill: exactly 10 visible upper tooth caps arranged in an arch, each outlined in polished yellow gold, with white diamond pavé surfaces; include rectangular baguette diamond panels on two lower sections near the left-center and right-center caps, plus smaller side caps receding into shadow. Inside the open mouth, place one full-body adult man crouching forward as if emerging from the darkness; he wears a dark navy tailored suit, white dress shirt, black tie, and shiny black leather gloves, one gloved hand resting on the lower lip in the foreground and the other bracing at the side. His face should be intentionally obscured/blurred by a plain skin-tone rectangular censor block while his black hair remains visible. Add a high-fashion cover masthead: enormous elegant white serif letters spelling LUXE across the top, partially overlaying the upper lip; small spaced white text MAGAZINE at upper left beneath the masthead; tiny white issue text SUMMER 2024 near the top right. Use dramatic studio lighting, glossy reflections, crisp photorealistic detail, shallow depth of field, editorial surrealism, luxury jewelry advertising aesthetics, no extra text, no watermark.
